workspace.title: Offline QR check-in
workspace.description: Authorize this device and keep recording attendance when connectivity drops.
workspace.privacyDescription: QR credentials contain no name or contact details. The roster, queue and device secret are authenticated and encrypted at rest.
workspace.noWallet: Attendance never changes balances or awards time credits.
workspace.ready: This device is ready for offline check-in.
workspace.notReadyDescription: Authorize this device while online. Manual name check-in remains available below.
workspace.loadErrorDescription: The secure workspace could not be loaded. Use manual name check-in below.

device.title: Authorized staff devices
device.label: Device label
device.reasonRequired: Enter a reason before revoking a device.
device.lostDescription: It will be blocked immediately and its local encrypted data must be removed when it next connects.
device.revoked: The device was revoked and its local offline data was removed.
device.empty: No devices are authorized for this event.

scan.title: Scan or enter attendee code
scan.description: Signed, PII-free codes are verified on this device before entering the encrypted queue.
scan.cameraUnavailable: Camera access is unavailable. Enter the code manually.
scan.reasonHint: Required for undo. Do not include sensitive information.
scan.queued: The attendance action was added to the encrypted queue.
scan.invalid: This code is invalid, copied, rotated, revoked, expired or belongs to another event.
scan.reasonRequired: Enter a reason before queuing an undo.
scan.transitionInvalid: That action does not follow the attendee's current offline state.

queue.title: Encrypted offline queue
queue.synced: Server decisions were applied to the queue.
queue.syncError: Sync failed. The encrypted queue is safe for another retry with the same idempotency keys.
queue.empty: No attendance actions are stored on this device.
queue.purgeDescription: The encrypted roster, device secret and unsynced actions will be permanently removed.

conflicts.title: Check-in conflicts
conflicts.description: Review stale or contradictory offline actions against the current attendance record.
conflicts.reasonRequired: Enter a reason before resolving the conflict.
conflicts.resolved: The audited conflict resolution was recorded.
conflicts.error: The record changed again. Refresh and review it.

manual.title: Manual check-in always remains available
manual.description: Use the live name search below whenever a QR code, camera or authorized device is unavailable.

credential.title: Your event check-in code
credential.description: This signed code identifies only this registration and event. It contains no name, email or phone number.
credential.load_error: Your check-in code status could not be loaded.
credential.one_shot: For security, the code is shown only when it is created or rotated.
credential.rotate_description: The current code will stop working immediately. Any saved or printed copy will be rejected.
credential.revoke_description: The code will stop working immediately. You can create a new code later while your registration remains confirmed.
credential.reason_required: Enter a reason before revoking the code.
credential.unavailable: A check-in code could not be created. Confirm that your registration is still active.
credential.privacy: The QR payload is PII-free. Event staff use their encrypted roster to match it to your registration.

errors.revoked: This device was revoked. Its offline data was removed.
errors.generic: That offline check-in action could not be completed.
